svg.aria-label: VectorMail system topology: an untrusted client and external Gmail mailbox cross a Clerk-authenticated, account-scoped trust boundary into the edge (middleware security headers, tRPC protectedProcedure, Zod, rate limits), through authoriseAccountAccess, into the engine — Aurinko integration and a per-account-locked sync feeding one PostgreSQL + pgvector data plane, with out-of-band Inngest workers and a FailedJob DLQ — then served over a data-plane bus by three rails with different blast radii: AI Search (read), Buddy (write, double-guarded), and Automation (opt-in, dry-run, idempotent).
svg.text: true to the code, not the brochure
Clerk verify · tRPC protectedProcedure · Zod on every input
headers: CSP frame-ancestors/object-src ‘none’ · HSTS · X-Frame DENY · nosniff · Referrer strict-origin
tenancy resolved once · no cross-tenant read
one consistency domain — the record IS the index
SURFACES · three rails, three blast radii
blast radius — shows the wrong email
blast radius — SENDS the wrong email
① OAuth connect → ② scope + lock → ③ idempotent upsert → ④ embed / summarize (async)
⑤ search: vector → text → ⑥ draft → moderate → send → ⑦ automate: dry-run → drain
one database · three guarded rails · separate blast radii
